name: Steve Leung Design Group Limited
summary: Steve Leung Design Group Limited provides interior design services in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and internationally. It operates through Interior Design Services, Interior Decorating and Furnishing Services, and Product Design Services segments. The company offers interior design, and decorating and furnishing services for residential projects, including show flats, sales offices, standard provisions, and club houses; private residence projects consisting of apartments, penthouses, and villas; and hospitality projects comprising restaurants, hotels, serviced apartments, and shopping malls, as well as commercial projects, such as office premises. It also trades in interior decorative products, as well as license arrangement of interior design services and product design services. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong. Steve Leung Design Group Limited is a subsidiary of Eagle Vision Development Limited.
